title: Ominous Bottle (3D Model)
body:
#  3D modeled ominous bottle. 
This resource pack will give you a fresh look at the ominous bottle in the form of a 3D model. Be careful and don't break it while it's still in your hands! ↓
![Transition](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f0f3f895dad8e0f033230f29e24fec3a6a0edd16.png)
Made by haveaniceday.
